As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCC Market Closes August on a Stronger Footing - In the final week of August, MEG activity strengthened sharply as cargo flows accelerated, with rates in some cases climbing nearly 10 points in a single day.
